description: The 'hazelcast-mock' workload in the 'data-grid' namespace is failing startup cluster quorum checks because it requires sequential hostnames. Re-architect this workload as a 3-replica StatefulSet linked to a headless 'hazelcast-discovery' Service (clusterIP: None), replacing the current stateless configuration. Detailed architecture specifications are available on the desktop. Access the environment via Rancher at https://localhost using credentials admin / Admin12345678!.

metadata.occupation: Cloud Infrastructure Architect / Site Reliability Engineer
